Interface IWaitFormFactory

Describes an interface which allows you to create wait forms and wait screen which also shows progress.

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public interface IWaitFormFactory

Methods

CreateWaitForm(WaitFormProperties, Form)

Creates an instance of IWaitForm using specified properties and owner.

Declaration
IWaitForm CreateWaitForm(WaitFormProperties properties, Form owner)
Parameters
Type Name Description
WaitFormProperties properties

Properties used to create IWaitForm.
Form owner

The owner form of the wait form.
Returns
Type Description
IWaitForm

Newly created an instance IWaitForm.
Remarks

Implementation of this method a copy of the properties object before using or passing it to the wait form. This ensures that the original 'WaitFormProperties' object is not modified and can be reused.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown, if specified properties or owner is null.
InvalidOperationException

Thrown, if specified owner's IsDisposed property returns true.

ShowOverlayWaitScreen(OverlayWaitScreenProperties, Control)

Shows an Overlay Form with the specified properties over the specified control.

Declaration
IOverlayWaitScreen ShowOverlayWaitScreen(OverlayWaitScreenProperties properties, Control owner)
Parameters
Type Name Description
OverlayWaitScreenProperties properties

Properties used to create IOverlayWaitScreen.
Control owner

A Control that should be overlapped by an Overlay Form.
Returns
Type Description
IOverlayWaitScreen
Remarks

Implementation of this method a copy of the properties object before using or passing it to the wait form. This ensures that the original 'OverlayWaitScreenProperties' object is not modified and can be reused.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown, if specified properties or owner is null.
InvalidOperationException

Thrown, if specified owner's IsDisposed property returns true.
